zh.lifeSummary: 當Maurice IV de Craon於1213年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延可拉奧時，他的父親Amaury I de CRAON39歲，母親Jeanne des Roches19歲。他於大約1240年與Isabelle de Lusignan結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1250年6月27日在他的家鄉享年37歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maurice IV de Craon于1213年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延可拉奧时，他的父亲Amaury I de CRAON39岁，母亲Jeanne des Roches19岁。他于大约1240年与Isabelle de Lusignan结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1250年6月27日在他的家乡享年37岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Craon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Krahn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerd, Gerhard, Hans, Hans-Peter, Horst, Irmgard, Mathias, Otto, Wilhelm, Willi.
German: nickname for a tall, slim long-legged person, from Middle Low German krane ‘crane’. Compare Kranich .

nameMeanings.name: Maurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Mauricius, a derivative of Maurus (a byname meaning ‘Moor’, i.e. ‘dark, swarthy’), borne by, among others, an early Byzantine emperor ( c.539–602 ). It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was popular in the Middle English period, but was not widely adopted by the nobility and became rare in the 17th century. Between the mid-19th century and the 1940s, it was moderately popular but has since faded again. See also Morris .

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Maurice IV de Craon was born in 1213, in Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Amaury I de CRAON, was 39 and his mother, Jeanne des Roches, was 19. He married Isabelle de Lusignan about 1240. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 27 June 1250, in his hometown, at the age of 37, and was buried in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maurice IV de Craon est né en 1213, à Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Amaury I de CRAON, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Jeanne des Roches, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle de Lusignan environ 1240. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 27 juin 1250, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maurice IV de Craon 1213 in Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Amaury I de CRAON 39 und seine Mutter Jeanne des Roches 19. Er hat um 1240 Isabelle de Lusignan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Juni 1250 im Alter von 37 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maurice IV de Craon è nato il nel 1213 nel Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Amaury I de CRAON, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne des Roches, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle de Lusignan circa 1240. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: Maurice IV de Craon(이)가 1213년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 크라에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Amaury I de CRAON(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne des Roches(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1240년 Isabelle de Lusignan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년 6월 27일 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Isabelle de Lusignan aproximadamente 1240. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de junho de 1250, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maurice IV de Craon родился в 1213 г. в местности краон, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Amaury I de CRAON было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne des Roches, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Lusignan около 1240 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 27 июня 1250 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maurice IV de Craon nació en 1213, en Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Amaury I de CRAON, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Jeanne des Roches, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Isabelle de Lusignan aproximadamente 1240. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 27 de junio de 1250, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
